purpose: Main window layout proof for custom title/header, role tabs, TopBar, P0-P1-P2-P3-P4 panels, P3H1/P3H2, P4V1/P4V2, and SBar.
inputs: Agent focus click when P4 is left
outputs: File Explorer role can show P1

proof.expected: DOM has TopRow, TopBar, MainRow, SBar, P0, P2, P3, P4, P3H1, P3H2, P4V1 by default

proof.actualProbe: click Tab 2 and confirm P1 appears

proof.expected: button cycles Hide P0 -> Hide P0+P1 -> Hide P1 -> Show P0+P1
proof.actualProbe: click TopBar left toggle four times

proof.expected: Switch Agent side Ctrl+E button moves P4 before/after side panels
proof.actualProbe: click switch icon and inspect P4 location

proof.expected: P4 has Chat/Chat 2/Chat 3 tabs, P4V1 chat, optional P4V2 sidebar, and X close
proof.actualProbe: click P4 Agent sidebar icon and X close

notProof: visible layout alone is not final product proof
real terminal/editor/agent integrations are placeholders in this slice
